mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO telemetry_watchlist_tag (bundle_id, wincc_variable_name, structure_type, data_type, display_label, floor_code, room_base, room_canonical, suite_suffix, metric_kind_code, cached_alarm_min_value, cached_alarm_max_value, cached_alarm_limits_at, alarm_override_min, alarm_override_max, enabled, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.bundleId}, #{item.winccVariableName}, #{item.structureType}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.displayLabel}, #{item.floorCode}, #{item.roomBase}, #{item.roomCanonical}, #{item.suiteSuffix}, #{item.metricKindCode}, #{item.cachedAlarmMinValue}, #{item.cachedAlarmMaxValue}, #{item.cachedAlarmLimitsAt}, #{item.alarmOverrideMin}, #{item.alarmOverrideMax}, #{item.enabled}, #{item.sortOrder})

INSERT INTO telemetry_watchlist_tag (bundle_id, wincc_variable_name, structure_type, data_type, display_label, floor_code, room_base, room_canonical, suite_suffix, metric_kind_code, cached_alarm_min_value, cached_alarm_max_value, cached_alarm_limits_at, alarm_override_min, alarm_override_max, enabled, sort_order) VALUES (#{bundleId}, #{winccVariableName}, #{structureType}, #{dataType}, #{displayLabel}, #{floorCode}, #{roomBase}, #{roomCanonical}, #{suiteSuffix}, #{metricKindCode}, #{cachedAlarmMinValue}, #{cachedAlarmMaxValue}, #{cachedAlarmLimitsAt}, #{alarmOverrideMin}, #{alarmOverrideMax}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE structure_type = VALUES(structure_type), data_type = VALUES(data_type), display_label = VALUES(display_label), floor_code = VALUES(floor_code), room_base = VALUES(room_base), room_canonical = VALUES(room_canonical), suite_suffix = VALUES(suite_suffix), metric_kind_code = VALUES(metric_kind_code), cached_alarm_min_value = COALESCE(VALUES(cached_alarm_min_value), cached_alarm_min_value), cached_alarm_max_value = COALESCE(VALUES(cached_alarm_max_value), cached_alarm_max_value), cached_alarm_limits_at = COALESCE(VALUES(cached_alarm_limits_at), cached_alarm_limits_at), alarm_override_min = COALESCE(VALUES(alarm_override_min), alarm_override_min), alarm_override_max = COALESCE(VALUES(alarm_override_max), alarm_override_max), enabled = VALUES(enabled), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order)
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.bundle_id, t.wincc_variable_name, t.structure_type, t.data_type, t.display_label, t.floor_code, t.room_base, t.room_canonical, t.suite_suffix, t.metric_kind_code, t.cached_alarm_min_value, t.cached_alarm_max_value, t.cached_alarm_limits_at, t.alarm_override_min, t.alarm_override_max, t.enabled, t.sort_order, t.created_at, b.code AS bundle_code, b.display_name AS bundle_display_name, mk.kind_role AS metric_kind_role, mk.label_zh AS metric_kind_label FROM telemetry_watchlist_tag t INNER JOIN telemetry_watchlist_bundle b ON b.id = t.bundle_id INNER JOIN telemetry_metric_kind mk ON mk.code = t.metric_kind_code AND mk.active = 1 WHERE t.enabled = 1 AND b.include_in_wincc_poll = 1 AND t.floor_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(t.floor_code) <> '' AND t.room_canonical IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(t.room_canonical) <> '' AND t.metric_kind_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(t.metric_kind_code) <> '' AND (t.display_label IS NULL OR TRIM(t.display_label) = '' OR TRIM(t.display_label) <> '无') ORDER BY b.id ASC, t.sort_order ASC, t.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM telemetry_watchlist_tag WHERE bundle_id = #{bundleId}

SELECT id, bundle_id, wincc_variable_name, structure_type, data_type, display_label, floor_code, room_base, room_canonical, suite_suffix, metric_kind_code, cached_alarm_min_value, cached_alarm_max_value, cached_alarm_limits_at, alarm_override_min, alarm_override_max, enabled, sort_order, created_at FROM telemetry_watchlist_tag WHERE bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, bundle_id, wincc_variable_name, structure_type, data_type, display_label, floor_code, room_base, room_canonical, suite_suffix, metric_kind_code, cached_alarm_min_value, cached_alarm_max_value, cached_alarm_limits_at, alarm_override_min, alarm_override_max, enabled, sort_order, created_at FROM telemetry_watchlist_tag WHERE bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT wincc_variable_name FROM telemetry_watchlist_tag WHERE bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, bundle_id, wincc_variable_name, structure_type, data_type, display_label, floor_code, room_base, room_canonical, suite_suffix, metric_kind_code, cached_alarm_min_value, cached_alarm_max_value, cached_alarm_limits_at, alarm_override_min, alarm_override_max, enabled, sort_order, created_at FROM telemetry_watchlist_tag WHERE bundle_id = #{bundleId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, bundle_id, wincc_variable_name, structure_type, data_type, display_label, floor_code, room_base, room_canonical, suite_suffix, metric_kind_code, cached_alarm_min_value, cached_alarm_max_value, cached_alarm_limits_at, alarm_override_min, alarm_override_max, enabled, sort_order, created_at FROM telemetry_watchlist_tag WHERE bundle_id = #{bundleId} AND wincc_variable_name = #{variableName} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, bundle_id, wincc_variable_name, structure_type, data_type, display_label, floor_code, room_base, room_canonical, suite_suffix, metric_kind_code, cached_alarm_min_value, cached_alarm_max_value, cached_alarm_limits_at, alarm_override_min, alarm_override_max, enabled, sort_order, created_at FROM telemetry_watchlist_tag WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE telemetry_watchlist_tag SET cached_alarm_min_value = CASE WHEN #{minVal} IS NOT NULL THEN #{minVal} ELSE cached_alarm_min_value END, cached_alarm_max_value = CASE WHEN #{maxVal} IS NOT NULL THEN #{maxVal} ELSE cached_alarm_max_value END, cached_alarm_limits_at = CASE WHEN #{minVal} IS NOT NULL OR #{maxVal} IS NOT NULL THEN #{at} ELSE cached_alarm_limits_at END WHERE wincc_variable_name = #{parentVar}
mapper.select: SELECT wincc_variable_name, cached_alarm_min_value, cached_alarm_max_value FROM telemetry_watchlist_tag WHERE (cached_alarm_min_value IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cached_alarm_min_value) <> '') OR (cached_alarm_max_value IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cached_alarm_max_value) <> '')
